appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/architecture.md Tokenlist Storage section to reflect current keys: localTokens, tokenlistStates, and isLocal in tokenlists.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the 'Write tests first (where applicable)' step to explicitly call out JS-only UI features as test-first exempt when Python/backend code is unchanged and browser-based validation is the primary method.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for tokenlist-management-ui reported no automated test additions for a vanilla JS-only feature; skill text includes this implicitly but could be more explicit for consistency.
